item.Description: The state of the state machine for azimuth axis
Actual speed setpoint of azimuth axis
Actual excitation data for azimuth axis. This data could be torque, speed or position excitation for position control or force for damping control
Actual azimuth axis electrical position read by hall sensor 1
Actual azimuth axis electrical position calculated by the encoder for hall sensor
Azimuth Damping Control Torque for X direcction.
Azimuth Damping Control Torque for Y direcction
Azimuth Position Control Torque before filtering and after applying the maximum torque filter
Azimuth Position Control Torque raw data, without any filtering
Actual position in azimuth axis control loop read by encoder head 1
Actual position in azimuth axis control loop read by encoder head 2
Actual position in azimuth axis control loop read by encoder head 3
Actual position in azimuth axis control loop read by encoder head 4
Azimuth Positive power off limit switch AND topple block pos A
Azimuth Negative power off limit switch AND topple block pos B
Status of the positive fixed software limit in azimuth axis
Status of the negative fixed software limit in azimuth axis
Status of the positive direcctional limit switch in azimuth axis
Status of the negative direcctional limit switch in azimuth axis
Status of the positive adjustable software limit in azimuth axis
Status of the negative adjustable software limit in azimuth axis
Elevation Positive power off limit switch
Elevation Negative power off limit switch
Mirror cover manual locked power cut-off switch
Azimuth platform Access door NO closed
Camera Cable Wrap Safety device limit positive(Pull cord)
Camera Cable Wrap Safety device limit negative(Pull cord)
Phase NO ok Any (Capacitor Bank Cabinet No closed)
Camera cable wrap safety device actuated pullcord (to GIS)
Failed MCS watchdog o loss communication (to GIS)
Real status override AZ lim+ AND topple block pos A
Real status Override AZ lim- AND topple block pos B
Real status Override Hatch NO closed
Real status Override Pull cord limit negative
Real status Override Pull cord limit positive
Mirror cover 1 assembly locked manual switch off
Mirror cover 2 assembly locked manual switch off
Azimuth Cable Wrap Negative limit switch
Azimuth Cable Wrap Positive limit switch
Azimuth Negative power off limit switch
Azimuth Positive power off limit switch
Elevation Negative power off limit switch
Elevation Positive power off limit switch
The state of the state machine for Elevation axis
The actual position of the Elevation axis
The actual torque of the Elevation axis
Actual speed setpoint of elevation axis
Actual excitation data for elevation axis. This data could be torque, speed or position excitation
Actual elevation axis electrical position read by hall sensor 1
Actual elevation axis electrical position read by hall sensor 2
Actual elevation axis electrical position calculated by the encoder for hall sensor 1
Actual elevation axis electrical position calculated by the encoder for hall sensor 2
Azimuth Position Control Torque before filtering and after applying the maximum torque filter
Azimuth Position Control Torque raw data, without any filtering
Actual position in elevation axis control loop read by encoder head 1
Actual position in elevation axis control loop read by encoder head 2
Actual position in elevation axis control loop read by encoder head 3
Actual position in elevation axis control loop read by encoder head 4
Status of the positive fixed software limit in elevation axis
Status of the negative fixed software limit in elevation axis
Status of the positive direcctional limit switch in elevation axis
Status of the negative direcctional limit switch in elevation axis
Status of the positive adjustable software limit in elevation axis
Status of the negative adjustable software limit in elevation axis
Status of the positive operational limit switch in elevation axis
Status of the negative operation limit switch in elevation axis
The state of the state machine for drive 1
The state of the state machine for drive 2
The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 1
The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 2
EL locking pin in test position
The interlock array for the Locking Pins
The state of the state machine for Deployable Platform 1
The state of the state machine for Deployable Platform 2
The state of the drive 1 for Deployable Platform 1
The state of the drive 2 for Deployable Platform 1
The state of the drive 1 for Deployable Platform 2
The state of the drive 2 for Deployable Platform 2
The state of the state machine for Deployable Platform
The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 1 for Deployable Platform 1
The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 2 for Deployable Platform 1
The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 1 for Deployable Platform 2
The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 2 for Deployable Platform 2
The actual position for drive 1 for Deployable Platform 1
The actual position for drive 2 for Deployable Platform 1
The actual position for drive 1 for Deployable Platform 2
The actual position for drive 2 for Deployable Platform 2
The interlock array for the Deployable Platforms
Current versión of software running in the Axes PXI
Current versión of software running in the TMA PXI
Represents the status of the Azimuth Cable Wrap State Machine
Status of Azimuth Cable Wrap drive 1
Status of Azimuth Cable Wrap drive 2
Current of the azimuth cable wrap drive 1
Current of the azimuth cable wrap drive 2
Actual difference between azimuth and azimuth cable wrap positions
Actual difference between azimuth and azimuth cable wrap position measured by LVDT sensor
Actual setpoing for azimuth cable wrap
Status of the positive directional limit switch in the azimuth cable wrap
Status of the negative directional limit switch in the azimuth cable wrap
The state of the state machine for drive 1
The state of the state machine for drive 2
The state of the state machine for drive 3
The state of the state machine for drive 4

The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 1

The actual percentage of the nominal torque for drive 4
The interlock array for the Balancing
The state of the state machine for Camera Cable Wrap
Status of Camera Cable Wrap drive 1
Status of Camera Cable Wrap drive 2
Position of the camera cable wrap measured by drive 1
Position of the camera cable wrap measured by drive 2
Camera rotator position received from SAL and written by the real time controller
Speed of the camera cable wrap measured by drive 1
Speed of the camera cable wrap measured by drive 2
Current of the camera cable wrap drive 1
Current of the camera cable wrap drive 2
Camera rotator position received from SAL and written by EUI
